texto: The communication function of modern writers is akin to the ancient role fulfilled by tribal shamans. All writers ultimately perform a shamanistic role in society
autor: their mythmaking voices speak to us from the underworld after their passage to the other side. Writers place themselves in a trance-like state where their unconscious mind dictates to them what to write.
explicacao: Citação de their mythmaking voices speak to us from the underworld after their passage to the other side. Writers place themselves in a trance-like state where their unconscious mind dictates to them what to write. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “The communication function of modern writers is akin to the ancient role fulfilled by tribal sham…” articula reflexao, kilroy-j-oldster, dead-toad-scrolls em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como dead-toad-scrolls.
